# Awesome AI Agent Tools

> The most comprehensive open-source directory for AI agent components. 357 curated skills, MCP servers, agent workflows, subagents, and plugins from 100+ repositories. Works with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, KiloCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, and every major AI coding assistant.

## What This Repo Contains

- **77 Curated Skills**: SKILL.md files from obra/superpowers, anthropics/skills, addyosmani, vercel-labs, and 30+ more sources
- **100 MCP Server Configurations**: Verified Model Context Protocol servers with install commands across 18 categories
- **107 Agent Workflows (Loops)**: Repeatable patterns with exact prompts, verification criteria, and source attribution
- **25 Subagent Definitions**: Specialized agents with model routing and tool permissions
- **48 Plugins**: Extensions for Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor, and 6 more platforms
- **Cross-Platform Support**: Works with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, KiloCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, Aider, and Windsurf
- **Catalogs with Metadata**: JSON catalogs for programmatic discovery and tooling integration

## Key Files

- [README](README.md) - Project overview, quick start, and full catalog
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to add skills, MCPs, or loops
- [Skills Library](skills/) - Catalog of 77 SKILL.md files across 9 categories
- [MCP Servers](mcps/) - Catalog of 100 MCP servers with install commands
- [Agent Loops](loops/) - 107 workflow patterns with catalog
- [Subagents](subagents/) - 25 specialized agent definitions with catalog
- [Plugins](plugins/) - 48 plugins across 9 platforms
- [Documentation](docs/) - Getting started, feature reference, tool comparisons
- [Prompt Engineering](prompting/) - Prompt techniques and strategies
- [Rules & Best Practices](rules/) - Security, ethics, quality guidelines
- [Workflows](workflows/) - Advanced autonomous workflows

## Topics
